name: remotecontrol
description: LAN virtual mouse with local bridge-hosted Svelte 5 PWA

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/pwa && npm run build -w apps/bridge
scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/pwa && npm run dev -w apps/bridge
scripts.package:exe: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/pwa && npm run package:exe -w apps/bridge
